summary: Phase 5 Compliance Deadline Notifications fully tested — backend 22/23 passing, frontend all 8 features verified. 3 demo compliance notifications (expired/expiring/missing_filing) working end-to-end with correct severity, icons, ComplianceDetail expansion, and Action Required category placement.

minor.issue: Demo notification demo_compliance_003 (SSS Contributions missing_filing) was manually inserted without 'dedup_key' in metadata. Real scheduler-generated notifications correctly include dedup_key (verified in main.py lines 572, 610, 644). Not a code bug — demo data was inserted manually.

action_items: Optional: Add dedup_key to demo_compliance_003 data in DB for consistency with scheduler-generated notifications. Not critical — code is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Scheduler _daily_compliance_check registered correctly in APScheduler at CronTrigger(hour=8, minute=30) — confirmed in supervisor logs.
severity_override param in create_notification works correctly: expired→critical, expiring→warning, missing_filing→warning all verified.

ComplianceDetail component correctly renders all 3 status variants: expired (EXPIRED label + 'Expired on: DATE'), expiring ('Expires in X days' + 'Valid until: DATE'), missing_filing ('MONTH — Not Filed' + 'Period: MONTH').
The days_left field in expiring notifications is populated via datetime arithmetic in the scheduler — verified as integer >=0.
The dedup check via metadata.dedup_key lookup prevents duplicate notifications on subsequent scheduler runs — correct pattern.

success_rate.backend: 95.7% — 22/23 tests passing (1 minor demo data issue)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested against 3 pre-existing demo compliance notifications: demo_compliance_001 (mayors_permit CRITICAL expired), demo_compliance_002 (bai_license WARNING expiring 12 days), demo_compliance_003 (sss_contributions WARNING missing_filing 2026-03).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Compliance Deadline Notifications fully tested and working. DB has 3 demo compliance notifications. All 3 are type=compliance_deadline, category=action, correct severity (critical for expired, warning for expiring/missing_filing). ComplianceDetail component expands correctly for all 3 status types. Action Required card shows 310 total with 3 unread badge. Bell icon shows 3 unread. Scheduler daily_compliance_check registered (runs at 8:30 AM daily). Only minor issue: demo_compliance_003 lacks dedup_key in metadata (manually inserted without it). All scheduler-generated notifications will have dedup_key.

backend_metadata_status_field.detail: status in {expired, expiring, missing_filing} — all valid

backend_dedup_key_present.detail: demo_compliance_003 missing dedup_key (manually inserted demo data). Scheduler-generated notifications will have it.

backend_no_duplicate_dedup_keys.detail: No duplicate dedup_keys among existing compliance notifications

frontend_compliance_orange_icons.detail: Orange FileWarning icon (bg-orange-100 class) confirmed on all 3 compliance rows

frontend_severity_badges.detail: critical badge (red) on Mayor's Permit, warning badge (amber) on BAI/SSS

frontend_view_detail_button.detail: 'View detail ↓' button present on all 3 compliance notifications

frontend_compliance_detail_missing_filin.detail: SSS Contributions → 'SSS Contributions | 2026-03 — Not Filed | Period: 2026-03'

frontend_compliance_detail_expired.detail: Mayor's Permit → 'Mayor's / Business Permit | EXPIRED | Expired on: 2026-02-28'

frontend_compliance_detail_expiring.detail: BAI License → 'BAI License to Operate | Expires in 12 days | Valid until: 2026-04-04'

frontend_action_required_card.detail: Action Required card: 310 total, 3 unread badge, orange active state. All 3 compliance notifs visible in filter.

frontend_bell_unread_badge.detail: Bell icon shows '3' with bg-red-500 rounded-full badge class confirmed

scheduler_registered.detail: APScheduler log confirms: 'Added job startup.<locals>._daily_compliance_check to job store default'
